images.depicts: large bronze bell tipping off its mount amid dirt/dust, chick startled beside it
images.issue: bell is an ornate bronze mounted bell, not the simple brass hand-bell from bell.png's spec; chick shows startle but not clearly 'wings thrown up in alarm'

images.depicts: large ornate gold ceremonial bell HANGING from a rope under a tree atop a mossy mound
images.issue: bell is HANGING from a tree branch, not 'sitting at the top of the hill' as spec requires; also far more ornate than the simple brass hand-bell used elsewhere

images.depicts: bronze bell mid-roll in motion blur with chick chasing through dust trail
chick pointing up at a bell, determined expression
chick headbutting a bronze bell with a burst of sparks/shine
chick running up a grassy slope with dust/effort particles trailing
small bright-green moss mound with a tiny bonsai-like sprout and a blade of grass at the top, sunbeam
images.issue: reads more like a moss mound with a miniature plant than a 'grassy hill with one lonely tree' — tree element is too small/toylike

images.depicts: potato-shaped object atop a mossy mound, chick and sheep looking up at it

images.issue: reads as a fur/yarn pom-pom rather than a cosmetic powder puff, but loosely acceptable for the word 'puff'

images.depicts: sheep nuzzling a bronze bell against its face/head, chick below
images.issue: spec wants the bell caught 'neatly on its back' (rescue/catch pose); image shows the bell held near the sheep's face/head instead
